texto: Just a few years ago, when I asked a neurologist if the brain and spinal cord could heal and regenerate, he said "no" and in his world, maybe 20 years ago, that was true. Not particularly useful but in that time and space—true. The cool thing about today is a neurologist reading his or her own medical research literature is compelled to answer "yes, under certain circumstances.
explicacao: Citação de Kimberly Burnham. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Just a few years ago, when I asked a neurologist if the brain and spinal cord could heal and rege…” articula tempo, healing, health em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e health.
